strengths: 15 years of progressive software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems with demonstrated advancement to senior/staff roles
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, testing) consistently applied across multiple languages and platforms
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of open-source GISCollective platform, plus teaching experience through workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products—only recent operational exposure to MCP and agent infrastructure at current role
Currently Staff Engineer, but role requires Director-level individual contributor seniority, a tier above
Missing preferred qualifications: no Master's/PhD in AI-related field; no evidence of advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption
response.justification: Candidate meets the 15-year minimum technical experience requirement and demonstrates solid software engineering fundamentals with clear progression to senior roles and entrepreneurial initiative. However, the role explicitly centers on AI strategy and specialized AI expertise with demonstrated products—areas where the resume shows only recent operational-level work (MCP, agent infrastructure) rather than deep strategic knowledge, thought leadership, or customer advisory experience in AI.
